entry.title: Re: Can we plan Vendor's capacity in SAP APO ?
entry.content: It is not Working

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
Hi!

If there are not a delivery route in the transport route, if there are only consolidations routes, then this is consider a two systems landscape, meaning that Copy link will be not clickable, I mean you could not create TOC for your TRs.

Best regards,

Dolores

entry.title: Re: Welcome
entry.content: Harry is now back in the community under his previous username - welcome back @harrystrauss 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion: Link Tiles not language sensitive?
entry.content:
Hi Shane,

Thanks for the clarification. I tried to do what you proposed, but now I get an error message which I did not expect.

I log into S/4HANA, in English and created the EN link tile. Then I changed the application language to DE. However when trying to create the DE link tile, I get an error message that language DE is not foreseen. Apparently it redirects me back to EN. Did we miss something in configuration somewhere? 

Hope you have a suggestion where to solve this? 
In the future we will have even more languages, so we need to tackle this in some way.

Best regards,
Carlo

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - Manufacturing Certification
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Is there any certification course available for Manufacturing in Public Cloud - 2408 edition ?

 

Thanks & Regards,

Murari Shah

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Create Your Rules (5/5)
entry.content:
Hello,
this example was helpful  - but anyway we are struggling with the implementation of sending message just to one single person in a sales case. 
Can anyone provide a solution "out-of-the-box" to send information back to the partner role (in our case it's PARVW = ER) ?
Furthermore I'm wondering why it's not possible to name just one or two teams out of the Team category, using app manage sit. types extended, tab situation triggers, part = recipients ?   
Thanks in advance for your help/ideas. BR

entry.title: Re: Benefits auto enrolment for New Hires and auto delimitation for Terminations
entry.content: Thank you for your help and the quick response. I really appreciate it, and I will follow the configuration steps as instructed.

entry.title: Re: Welcome
entry.content:
Thanks Anne (@AnnePetteroe) for you fast support and your endurance.
Highly appreciated!

Cheerio
Harry

entry.title: Re: Document Information Extraction Premium using the UI...
entry.content:
Have you looked at the API's for Document Information Extraction?   Check out the Document API's here: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/document-information-extraction/document-information-extraction/api-reference

entry.title: Re: Welcome
entry.content:
This is great news @harrystrauss - welcome back for real! 

@AnnePetteroe - "service with a smile" once again! 😊

entry.title: ME21N Document overview within the Selection variant
entry.content: I create PO's under ME21N and have created several variants and would like them to appear in the drop-down under the document overview when I click on the selection variant icon. How can I add to that drop-down list so that my variants appear.

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Create Your Teams (2/5)
entry.content:
Thanks a lot for this explanations! It's very helpful.

I'm wondering why it's not possible to name just one or two teams out of the Team category, while using app 'manage situation types extended', tab situation triggers, part = recipients ?   
I see the chance to filter  -
anyway from my pov I would appreciate to select maybe just one team of the category/profile -
I'm working on private cloud - and I'm not allowed creating several "Team categories".
I'm allowed to create profiles, but not team categories (SIMG_RSM_V_TMC_S_FNP / cust.object: RSM_V_TMC_S_FNPR)
Thanks in advance for further information! BR

entry.title: Re: Call rest api cloud identity service authentication
entry.content: I found solution using the api SCIM through a basic authentication.

entry.title: Formula for bill of materials (BOM)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Let's say out of 10 components in BOM, component A appears 4 times in recipe/BOM. 

Out of those 4 -> 3 times the quantity should be fixed (which I know how to do) irrevelant to the batch size.

Now what I dont know how to do is to adjust the last, 4th time component A appears depending on the batch size. 

Formula for the 4th could be: '=total share of component A in the recipe * (batch/100) - all fixed amounts

 

Please, any help is much appreciated.

entry.title: New podcast - ﻿SAP Learning Insights - Learning ABAP Programming with Dr. Clemens Mannert
entry.content:
Dear Learners,

I am glad to inform you that we have recently been published on SAP Podcasts  

SAP Learning Insights - Learning ABAP Programming with Dr. Clemens Mannert

For this episode David Chaviano invited Dr. Clemens Mannert to talk about the programming language ABAP, developed specifically for SAP applications. They explore Clemens's journey from physics to software development and deep dive into the evolution of ABAP from its initial use cases for reporting and transactions to its modern applications involving back-end services, APIs and AI. Clemens provides recommended learning paths for newcomers, highlighting the importance of mastering foundational programming languages before diving into ABAP. He also gives some outlook on the future of ABAP in relation to emerging technologies, particularly the role of artificial intelligence in streamlining development processes. Finally, you get as always some final words of wisdom from our guest.

Tune in for key insights on navigating AI implementation in the workplace!

ABAP related resources

    • Acquiring Core ABAP Skills
    • SAP BTP, ABAP environment
    • SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud

      How to get started SAP Learning here are some resources:

      • Visit SAP Learning
      • Learn more about SAP Learning Hub
      • Join our SAP Learning group dedicated for Learning and moderated by SAP Learning Experts (SMEs).

Enjoy listening to this new podcast! 

Subscribe to via
Spotify   Apple Podcast    TuneIn

entry.title: Create a report with the result of the transports imported using SAP CTMS
entry.content:
If you want to run your operations smoothly with SAP Integration Suite and avoid the wild west of manual export and imports in different environments you have few options to choose from top of my head:

  1. Implement CI/CD pipelines using SAP tools, 3rd party tools or Open Source tools developed by the community like FlashPipe or CPILint to automate governance.
  2. Use tools from SAP Partners like figaf to do the heavy lifting besides many other stuff. 
  3. Implement SAP Cloud Transport Management Services (SAP CTMS) to manage the transports which you can even control from Solution Manager (and probably also Cloud ALM)

I wanted to focus on the third scenario, but not how to do the initial implementation. Instead, I would like to explore the requirement of creating a small report/summary of what was moved to production during the last release window as not everyone will have access to SAP CTMS to check by themselves, as it was the case with the access to the STMS in the On-Prem systems.

The idea is to consume the available APIs from SAP CTMS to get the list of transports and their logs and send the information to the relevant audience via email in the less ugly format possible.

First step, as always these days, is to go to the SAP Business Accelerator Hub and find out what is available for SAP CTMS.

Unfortunately there is no OData APIs, only REST, but of course this will not stop us. Looking more into the details, I can imagine the initial scope of the APIs were to trigger the import of TRs externally as most of the CRUD operations are "POST" and "DELETE" and not to use it to build a report as we are trying to achieve. 

Anyways, we thankfully have few GET operations available:

  1. Get the list of Transport Requests
  2. Get the logs for the Transport Requests

We can even do the initial testing directly from Business Accelerator Hub as soon as we know a couple of details:

  1. The NodeID from SAP CTMS. In our case we only want to get the report of the import to Production so we will need the ID of just that node.
  2. BTP Region and Subdomain where SAP CTMS is deployed.
  3. We need as well to create a Service key in BTP to get the Cliend ID and Client Secret.

The Try Out mechanism will help us to know what is the url we need to use when building the whole process in SAP Integration Suite.

But first, let's dive in the two operations I mentioned above:

  1. Get the list of Transport Requests

    NodeID -> Makes sense, we have it.

    Status -> Right, we want to know what happened with the TRs. We are not interested in the TRs that have not been imported (initial) or the ones that were already deleted, but I would rather prefer to not select any status but filter by date. However, what are the dates we can use?
           Start/End date and time of transport request creation -> It could have been several months ago.
           Start/End date and time of queue entry creation -> The TR is added to the Production Node  automatically when it is moved to the QAS environment, which could have been also weeks or months ago, when the development was released for testing.

    In summary, we don't have the way to fetch only the Transport Requests that were imported at a certain point of time into the Production Node. We need to extract EVERYTHING we have in the node based on the status and use the next operation to know when it was imported.

    The double whammy is that I could not make a single call to get all the TRs for the different statuses I am interested. I tried different ways to add an OR clause but all of them failed, so at the end I had to do one call for each status and then gather all the results:

    Each record will look like this:


  2. Get the logs for the Transport Requests

    Again we need to use the NodeID and the TransportID of each TransportRequest obtained before (XPATH: /*/*/*/*/id)


    When we fetch the logs of each TR we get lot of information for different actions:

    We are only interested of what happened during the Import (Action Type = "I") so we can check the status of this step only and when the action started:

    We have all the information we need, but unfortunately for way too more TRs we wanted... and the problem is the list will increase and increase because we will have every release more "Succeeded" TRs.

If we kick the can down the road, we can discard the entries the TRs where the import happened before a certain threshold and only write the information for the ones of our last production release.

For the relevant entries we saved few details to build a csv: 

 

${property.transportRequestId},${property.descriptionFormatted},${property.ImportDate},${property.status}\r\n

 

We need to Gather all of them, add a Header:

 

TransportID,Description,ImportDate,Status
${in.body}

 

And finally, convert the CSV to HTML before sending it via email:

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;

def Message processData(Message message) {

// Get the CSV content from the message body
        def csvContent = message.getBody(String).replaceAll("succeeded","🟢").replaceAll("error","🔴").replaceAll("fatal","🔴").replaceAll("warning","⚠")

        // Initialize HTML content
        def html = new StringBuilder()
        html.append("<html>\n<head>\n<title>BTP imports</title>\n</head>\n<body>\n")
        html.append("<table border='1' style='border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%;'>\n")

        // Convert CSV content to HTML table
        csvContent.split("\n").eachWithIndex { line, index ->
            def cells = line.split(",") // Split by comma
            html.append("<tr>\n")
            cells.each { cell ->
                if (index == 0) {
                    // First row as table headers
                    html.append("<th style='padding: 8px; text-align: left;'>${cell.trim()}</th>\n")
                } else {
                    // Other rows as table data
                    html.append("<td style='padding: 8px; text-align: left;'>${cell.trim()}</td>\n")
                }
            }
            html.append("</tr>\n")
        }

        html.append("</table>\n</body>\n</html>")

        // Set the HTML content as the message body
        message.setBody(html.toString())
    
    return message   
    }

 

Remember to select the Text/HTML in the Mail adapter:

And the result is:

Conclusions

The result is bittersweet.

On one hand, the solution is solving the requirement and to be honest, the response from the SAP CTMS API is quite good. We have in our node already a little bit more than 1200 TRs in different status than initial or deleted. So we are doing 7 calls to get the TRs and another >1200 to get all the logs before putting everything together and send the email. The complete process is taking around 5 minutes.

On the other hand, this solution is not sustainable as we will have more and more TRs so the process will take longer and longer. Therefore I don't encourage anyone to implement this without knowing the implications. 

I hope changes to these APIs or the release of new ones can allow us a better way of getting the information in a smarter and efficient way. I used the feedback option in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub to ask for it but I don't know if that is going to move the needle in any way. If #SAP is reading this, please give us a wink!
Is there an influence program for BTP in general so we can submit these kind of requests?

And last but not least, I would like to ask the SAP Integration Community if you have had a more clever idea to solve this or a similar situation. I am here to learn so I am looking forward to reading your comments!

Cheers

Javier

entry.title: SAP SPM Incentive Management - Advanced Workflow White Paper - Call Workflow REST APIs in GCP
entry.content:
Introduction

This Blog gives an introduction to the Advanced Workflow REST APIs and provides guidance on executing them from external applications in the GCP platform.

These APIs can be called from third-party applications to integrate with the Advanced Workflow application seamlessly. The Workflow REST APIs enable users to perform various operations on Workflow objects easily using standard HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE.

This Blog assumes that you have prior knowledge and experience with the following SAP SPM applications:

  • Advanced Workflow
  • IAS

You will need to work with your team to get Administration permissions to these 2 applications on your GCP tenant to be able to run the examples explained in this blog.

You will also need to use a REST client to execute the Advanced Workflow REST APIs. The example provided in this document use 'Bruno' as the REST client.

In the old Legacy platform, Workflow REST APIs utilized the Basic Authentication mechanism with standard HTTP headers, meaning no handshakes were required. However, the user performing Workflow API calls needed to have admin rights in the Workflow system.

On the new GCP platform, authentication has been enhanced. All SPM applications, including Advanced Workflow, now use IAS OAuth2 for authentication. The IAS configuration is completed during the Workflow tenant provisioning, where a Client ID is set up which can be used for APIs authentication. This process will be explained in detail in the following sections of this document.

This document explains the following steps:

  • Step 1: How to create a new Client Secret in IAS.
  • Step 2: How to update the IAS Client ID in Advanced Workflow.
  • Step 3: An example of how to call a Workflow REST API from a REST client (Bruno).

Step 1: Create a new Client Secret from IAS Admin Console

Log in to your IAS Admin console and open your Workflow OIDC application, which typically follows the naming convention “WF_OIDC_[TENANT]_App”:

 Copy the Client ID shown on “Client Authentication” page:

 

Click on “Add” to create a new Secret from “Secrets” section on the same “Client Authentication” page:

 

On the new page, add a description (i.e.: Workflow API Client Secret) and keep the default values:

 Click on Save:

After the new Client Secret is created you need to copy both the Client ID and Client Secret as you will need them later.

When this is done, you can proceed to the next step.

Step 2: Update IAS Client ID in Advanced Workflow

Log in to the Incentive Management Portal and navigate to Workflow application:

From Workflow go to Setup > USERS > Users:

From here, select a Workflow Administrator user and update the IAS Client ID field with the Client ID of your Workflow OIDC application from IAS (this is the same value you copied as described in the previous section):

Now that you have completed all the configurations, you are ready to call the Workflow REST APIs.

Step 3: Call an Advanced Workflow REST API from a REST client (Bruno)

Now that you have your Client ID and Client Secret, and you’ve configured the IAS Client ID for your Workflow Admin user, you can call the Workflow REST APIs.

Before you begin, ensure you have the following information available:

Field

Example

Workflow application internal host name

xg3-wf-sbox.workflow.cloud.sap

IAS host name

[SAPI _IAS_HOSTNAME ].accounts.ondemand.com

Client ID

dddde129-de6e-47c1-95fc-646b38259a7a

Client Secret

XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX

Tenant

[GCP TENANT]

First, you need to obtain a JWT access token using your Client ID and Client Secret.

Once you have the token, you can configure Bearer authentication to make calls to the Workflow REST API.

To get the JWT access token, send a POST request to:

https://<sap_ias_hostname>/oauth2/token

You need to use Basic Authorization passing these 2 values:

username

[Client ID]

Password

[Client Secret]

With these 2 Header parameters:

grant_type

client_credentials

Domain

[Tenant]

Now you can run the authentication REST API from Bruno to get the access token.

Bruno Example:

1. Authorization:

 2. Header Params:

 

3. Response:

 After obtaining the Access Token (refer to the previous section), you can use it to call the Workflow REST API. Include the token in your API header using Bearer authentication.

When calling the Workflow REST API you need to use the following Header parameters:

Content-Type

application/json

domain

[Tenant]

Authorization

Bearer [Access Token]

Bruno Example:

For this example, we will call a Workflow REST API to retrieve a case using an existing Case Key by executing the GET cases Workflow REST API.

NOTE: Below you can find a link to the Workflow API documentation, which provides detailed information about all the Workflow REST APIs.

To get a Case using the Case Key you need to execute a GET request to:

https://<advanced_workflow_hostname>/wpm/api/cases/[case_key]

Headers:

 

Response:

 The response of this REST API returns all the information of the case requested.

References:

Advanced Workflow REST API online documentation:

Workflow REST API Help

Bruno online documentation:

What is Bruno? – Bruno Docs

entry.title: Gl Account Hierachy DATA INSERTING TO THE NEW HIERACHRY
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We have two hierarchies  one is for 2024 and the other is 2025 for GLaccount.

under 2024 hierarchy  we have 10 GL account

under 2025 hierachy we have 9 gl accounts

but user want when he execute the report  for 2025,  he can able to see the 9 gl account.

he want see the 10th GL account of 2024 in 2025 hierarchy 

Need urgent help !

entry.title: Leveraging Cross-Installation Meter Consumption in SAP for Utilities
entry.content:
In SAP for Utitilies, during billing we need to get consumption values from a meter that belongs to a different installation for the same billing period, we need to use premise meter consumption and a percetange of consumption of the other meter to get a net consumption value to use in our billing process. The aim is to apply same logic to one or more installations that will use a pecentage of consumption of this meter.

Please suggest options to achieve this function.

entry.title: Re: GL accounts included in EC01 copy company code transport request
entry.content:
Hi raymond_giuseppi,

Thank you for the response.

No we have not tried EC01 again to delete the object.

can you guide me with some steps to do that.

Thank you in advance.

Regards,

Sumant

entry.title: Cloud identity service SCIM api to retrieve personal information
entry.content:
Using the SCIM api, for example  https://xxxxx.accounts.ondemand.com/scim/Users I'm able to get informations about users and group of the IAS through basic authorization for my admin account, and through  bearer token for a system user. But, if I want to get my personal information, and I'm not an Admin user, but easily a user created into IAS, how can i get my informations? 

There is a particular endpoint to use for get my details?

If I try with the current SCIM andpoint I receive 403.

entry.title: Re: how to get count of a name that is appearing multiple...
entry.content:
Hi User,

Please refer below answer via scripting it is possible to count which country repeated how many times.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-analytics-cloud-property-count/qaq-p/13982095

 

Kindly upvote if you find it helpful!

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Clean code checks for ABAP – Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja ,

I understand about the custom namespace concept on public cloud. Would this be the same case with the opensource namespaces, as  /CC4A/ is an opensource namespace with is already reserved by SAP ?

Thanks

-A

entry.title: Re: Communicate from a Java Application to ABAP via WebSocket RFC using JCo - Migration Guide
entry.content:
Hi Simon,

@simon_luser i have also accomplished communication between JCo Client to SAP Public Cloud via WebSocketRFC but i am not able to do the opposite like calling an outbound service from SAP Public Cloud (embedded Steampunk) in a java program (JCo WebSocketRFC server). I have described what i have done in the following post --> https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/communicate-from-sap-public-cloud-to-java-application-jco-server-via/qaq-p/13999305

Maybe you have some ideas what i am doing wrong?

Regards!

entry.title: entity with field @mandatory (@assert.notNull @Common.FieldControl: #Mandatory;) not being check
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently having an issue when doing an cds.ql.INSERT, my entity has the annotation @mandatory in the schema definition, however when I do an insert in an action, it is allowing me to insert the null value in the database for a mandatory field, I was expecting to get an error.(when using the Fiori UI works fine) I am using @SAP/cds: 8.5.1, and testing locally.

is it there a way to enforce this validation at the database/cds level?

 

thanks,

Tatiana F.

entry.title: How to get the username in error 06 307 Info record & already being processed
entry.content:
Same error on PO level: SAP tells you who is blocking the PO.
I would like the same for info record.
Is this adjustable in SPRO?

entry.title: S/4 Public Cloud ECS - issue with triggering the ECS setup
entry.content:
Hi SAP enthusiast,

our client is in a S/4 Public Cloud implementation project and we are facing issues with the ECS (Error Correction System) functionality which is one of their requirements. We have made the ECS configuration and while testing it with the 'Upload Posting Data - Error Correction and Suspense Accounting' app facing a formatting error with the template downloaded from the transaction (Specify the information in correct format as described in the input file). Various formatting was tried unsuccessfully.

We have also tried to trigger the ECS by pushing data through the interfaces it is supposed to work with, but it also did not work.

We have opened an incident as well, but were wondering if anyone else has experienced such issues with the Public Cloud's ECS functionality before. 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: When will Quote 1.0 stop being supported?
entry.content:
Hi

Currently, there is no defined date for sun setting of Quote 1.0. There is an ongoing effort of enabling all features present for Quote 1.0 in Quote 2.0, creation of new ones and enabling migration of customers currently using the "old engine", but no deadlines as of now.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to create a Snapshot of the KF projectedinventory?
entry.content:
Hello,

i had the same problem and i solved it by creating a new KF that is only displaying the values of projected stock on wkprodloc level. Then I created the snapshot KFs based on that KF and then I modified the formula of all snapshot Key figures by adding the IBP_LPA function and it works.

i understand it is annoying to modify the formula of all Snapshot key figures but i did not find another solution or workaround. Did you find any other solution?

Hope it helps.

Jacopo

entry.title: Creation of condition records not possible in Scheduling Agreement
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

When I'm trying to create conditions for new velidity period for existing SA, update gets canceled. When change is made in ME32L with new validity period (01.01.2025-31.12.2025 with reference to previous one 01.01.2024-31.12.2024) I get info that change was saved. However changes are not visable at all and after a moment I get notification that update was canceled:

Doc type is YIC. It seems that I have a deadlock on some processes:

Do you have any idea on how to handle that case so these new prices can be updated?

Many thanks!

entry.title: Al abrir una cotización, pedido o factura hay que actualizar
entry.content:
Tengo problema que se ha suscitado de un par de días para acá, cuando abro un documento de venta (cotización, pedido o factura se habilita el botón de actualizar). Si actualizo, avanzo de documento y retrocedo, nuevamente se habilita

Pasos que realicé y el problema persiste

1- Eliminé todas las búsquedas formateadas

2- Comenté el transaction notification

3- Restauré una base anterior y el problema no pasaba

entry.title: SAP BTP Feature Flags Service instance access in NodeJs and deployment
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

I have created one Feature Flags Service instance in BTP (featureflag). which i am trying to access in my Nodejs application using npm package @@sap/xsenv. which works fine in local run. I am getting all the details.

But problem occurs at the time of deployment. It does not recognize the feature-flags.

But we have the instance of feature-flags

Nodejs code -

 

var services = xsenv.getServices({
    "xsuaa": { name: 'basicnodejs-xsuaa' },
    "feature-flags": { name: 'featureflag' }
 });

 

Looking for help.

entry.title: Re: Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding - setup guide
entry.content:
Hi @nageshcaparthy ,

The step 8.3 to GET all pipelines works perfectly and returns null value, but when i proceed with step 8.4 for Content Ingestion, I am encountered with the following error. I have verified the SharePoint name and Destination multiple times, also tried with changing the name of SharePoint and using that in the query. Nothing seems to be resolving the issue. Have you or your team encountered this error?

entry.title: Re: Communicate from SAP Public Cloud to Java Application (Jco Server) via WebSocketRFC Problem
entry.content: Do you see the full failure text? Can you activate JCo trace to see if you even reach the JCo server?

entry.title: Rate category change process - Best practice
entry.content:
Hello experts.

My client has around 80 rate categories.

In some scenarios, installation changes from an only active energy to active, demand and reactive measure. In this case, meter must be replaced to one that supports 3 registers.

Is there a best practice process for a rate category change when meter device needs to be replaced? Is there a way to avoid issues with changes at the beggining of billing period?

entry.title: Re: Clean code checks for ABAP – Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Amandeep,

you should be able to create the /CC4A/ namespace as any other namespace in S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: How to get XML data for local preview of print forms without output history
entry.content:
The "Download Debug Sheet" link has been disabled and provides the following message: "Sorry, access through this link has been removed by admin policy. Please contact the person who shared it with you."

Are you able to reactivate it?

entry.title: Re: GL accounts included in EC01 copy company code transp...
entry.content:
I would suggest

  1. You could use MASS on BUS3006 to set deletion flag on unwanted accounts
  2. Copy current GL chart of account from production to development using FS15/FS16
  3. Use the replace option in EC01 as you did with the copy
  4. Transport

But be aware, I never did the same error (to forget the step 2 to synchronize production/development before copy)

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 亮点前瞻：寻源和采购话题
entry.content:
本篇博客展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502 当中寻源和采购版块发布的新功能以及重大变化须知，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 寻源和合同管理
  • 运营采购
  • 发票管理

寻源和合同管理

新增应用：维护配额协议

在现有“管理配额协议”Fiori应用的基础上，新增了SAP GUI for HTML 应用：维护配额协议

运营采购

弃用应用：处理采购申请

此将在未来版本中从 SAP Fiori 快速启动板中移除。我们建议您尽快切换到后继应用处理采购申请 (V2)

采购申请中的订单确认和提前装运通知

在集中采购场景里，现在可以查看采购申请项目（例如“订单确认”）的后续凭证（供应商确认在指定时间内以指定价格交付指定数量的产品）和“提前装运通知”（其中包含供应商提供的有关特定订购物料发货时间和收货时间的信息）。

作为员工，在我的采购申请 - 新应用中，您现在可以在采购申请项目的状态详细信息中查看订单确认和提前装运通知。

对于服务项目或增强限制，订单确认和提前装运通知文档不受支持，并且不会显示在“状态详细信息”中。

季节管理和高级公司间库存转储

随着 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 中行业解决方案的零售和时尚行业和垂直业务的可用性，现在可以在高级公司间库存转储流程中使用季节管理。

在希望销售的季节制造零售产品的流程中，系统会在采购订单中确定季节（如果启用了季节管理），并在项目级别显示季节详细信息。在采购订单和库存转运订单等文档中，系统会根据商品主数据中的季节分配和自定义活动中的设置来确定季节。每当提到供货地点时，系统会考虑销售期间以进行季节确定。高级公司间流程现在支持使用季节信息，即系统允许将季节信息从销售公司的标准销售订单（销售流程）或接收公司的公司间采购订单（库存转移流程）复制到公司间销售订单，而无需重新确定或验证。

发票管理

新配置对象

SSCUI 106851禁用物料主数据的期间检查

如果取消激活物料主记录的期间检查，则系统不再执行总账科目过账和资产过账检查。但是，对于直接过账到物料和含采购订单参考的发票，仍会进行检查。

Ariba 集成场景

SAP Ariba Buying（基础版）中添加供应商门店

可以向供应商站点添加连接，以允许用户搜索该站点上的项目并将其添加到 SAP Ariba Buying 中的购物车

 

使用 Document Information Extraction 模板

在SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management的新功能中，此功能基于供应商使用的发票凭证的布局创建凭证信息提取模板。这些模板可用于使系统能够在给定的供应商发票布局中查找最初未正确提取的发票数据字段。这会改进从发票中提取数据。现在可以使用新创建的“管理 Document Information Extraction 模板”应用创建和管理模板。

中开启新的审批条件

在SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management的新版本中，您现在可以使用以下提到的开始条件和步骤条件：

  1. 发票基于采购订单
  2. 发票至少包含一项非采购订单项目
  3. 供应商发票类型为贷项通知单
  4. 公司代码货币中的总金额

 

发票缺少收据的自动重新处理

在SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management的新版本中，现在可以在“管理处理服务”应用中激活“发票缺少收据的自动重新处理”。启用此过程后，可以确定缺少收据的发票的重新处理周期数。此功能可以更好地显示发票状态，并减少需要手动处理的发票数量。 在“参考对象匹配”步骤中，系统会检查任何缺少的收据，包括货物收据或服务录入单。如果采购订单项目标记为基于货物收据的发票核实，但没有张贴收据，则该收据被认为是缺失的。然后系统会转到新的处理步骤，即“等待收据”。

集中采购合同的批量更改

在SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management的新版本中，通过离线 Microsoft Excel 上传扩展现有的集中采购合同批量更改功能，支持更新和创建为价格阶梯维护配置的条件类型的价格阶梯值。 仅在准备模式下保存通过批量更改新创建或更新的集中采购合同的能力。

离线 Excel 上传支持附加字段，包括：

  • 项目级的分子和分母
  • 项目级的计划交付期限
  • 项目级的项目类别
  • 价格条件级的度量单位转换
  • 分配级的国际贸易术语分类和地点 1

 

 

 

更多关于 SAP S/4HANA Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition:

  • 后勤常见热点问题汇总FAQ查看
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 2408 采购话题亮点前瞻 查看 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 2402 采购话题亮点前瞻 查看 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 2308 采购话题亮点前瞻 查看 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 2302 采购话题亮点前瞻 查看

关注 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 标签， PSCC_Enablement 标签，和PSCC_CCC_CN 标签来第一时间了解我们的最新博客。

entry.title: Re: Enabling Access to On-Premise S/4HANA Applications in SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

Have you done the Trust Configuration for your SAP BTP Subaccount?

Your user ID should also have complete Access in the IAS tenant.

please refer to this link - https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/trust-and-federation-with-identity-providers.

Thanks,

Ankita

entry.title: WEBI report: sum() in footer calculation ignores filters
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm having an issue on a webi report constructed on a universe that I created. I have a couple of measures that i show in a table, where I also set a filter (report-level, not query-level) to just show columns o a specific person.

The problem is that the aggregation function sum(), which is set as footer calculation for both measures, behave differently from one measure to the another: for measure "A" properly displays a sum of just the lines that remained from filtering, while sum of measure "B" still shows the overall total, ignoring the presence of the filter.

Both A and B are configured as numeric measures with sum() function in the universe (they seem identical to me), the only difference is that they originate from 2 distinct database tables.

Anyone experienced the same?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to download multiple billing document PDF Output
entry.content:
Hi Kayi, hope you're well. 

As mentioned on KBA 3208892 - How to mass download PDF invoices - S/4HANA Cloud, in S/4HANA Cloud you can download multiple PDF from Billing Documents using  API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/GetPDF.

The action itself is called for one Billing Document, however, with a Batch request you can have multiple GetPDF action calls in one OData Request (API).

You can also achieve it with a generic way by following this process: Mass Download of Billing Documents Output for Commercial Projects (5BP)

Hope this helps you. 

Warm regards, 

Vic

entry.title: Re: EWM FM to update delivery quantity and Post goods issue for outbound delivery
entry.content: Thank you, Sandeep. I’m glad this works. I truly appreciate your valuable input.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA for EHS-IM - Search for user retrieves username with an extra "D" letter
entry.content:
When trying to allocate “responsible person” to a Location, Task, or changing an Investigation Lead in an incident, the system is adding and extra “D” before the username in some users, retrieving the message that the user does not exist. This behavior is seemingly happening with random users.

Below I'm posting one of such cases - I blanked some info for privacy reasons.

In the "Select: Name" search box (3rd image), the blanked users are being retrieved correctly, with their name and BP number between brackets, but for others my customer's system is retrieving the SAP username with an initial "D" appended to it! As such the system doesn't recognize it, generating the error message "DUSERNAME does not exist".

All users are similarly and (apparently) correctly created. This behavior started mid-december and affects users in an apparent random way, regardless the time of user creation, plant they belong to, etc. 

Additional (I hope useful) information: this customer is in the first stages of implementing Success Factors but is still using the "old" HCM solution.

Has anyone seen this happen before?

Thanks in advance for your time

entry.title: Re: S/4 OnPrem - Is Key User Extensibility "Clean Core" b...
entry.content: For now I'll keep the In-App extensibility using the HOME software component and developments using the complete ABAP Cloud setup

entry.title: CAP Application 404 error after CF deployment
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

We are studying a proof of concept using CAP development. The application runs locally but raises a 404 error in CF after deployment. 



I published the app in the work zone, but I still received the same error, and I'm unsure how to resolve this issue.

I've changed the YML and JSON extensions to the TXT to upload the files here. 

Does somebody know what I should do?
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to write driver program JIT Schedule Adobe form program.
entry.content: If anyone stumbles from same problem the issue was the form was configured twice. Once in NACE output type pdf and once in program sequence in output details in top left of NACE outputs.

entry.title: Re: How to convert SAP WebDynpro Apps to FIORI apps with...
entry.content:
For less efforts, WDAs may be set up as Fiori apps/tiles. Came across this workaround a couple of times in the past. Try the following with one of the WDAs and check the look and feel when launched from Fiori app tile.

SAP Note 2441712 - How to Add a Web Dynpro App to Fiori Launchpad Step-by-Step (How to Add a Web Dynpro application to SAP Fiori Launchpad) https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/fioritech/3362178893.html

https://blogs.sap.com/2018/10/02/configuring-web-dynpro-applications-in-sap-fiori-launchpad/

https://blogs.sap.com/2016/04/04/how-to-launch-web-dynpro-abap-from-the-sap-fiori-launchpad-the-simple-way/

In the WD App > Parameters, try adding Parameter WDPREFERREDRENDEING with Value = STANDARDS and Parameter WDUIGUIDELINE with Value = FIORI.

In Fiori Launchpad Designer > Target Mapping, the WD App and Configuration may be entered.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud hourly/minutely calculations
entry.content:
@Deb_D 

Though SAC has a Timestamp dimension I am not sure if that would be of any help in your case. The best I can think of is using Measures to store this data and may be in minutes so that you could convert them accordingly.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Result Analysis based on period Planned Cost & Revenue
entry.content: I'd be very interested in how you believe this would work. We are testing PS planning by Year/Period (No Overall) and RA is using Cumulative Costs. Type: E, Profit: Q

entry.title: Re: How to get the username in error 06 307 Info record &...

Please check this Help page on the subject to find an alternative for VF22.

Vic

entry.title: Predictive Quantity Contract Consumption
entry.content:
Dear Team,

when I use the app Quantity Contract Consumption (App ID is F2012) the predictive consumption percentage is always 0. I followed the steps of the best practice 1QR and trained and activate the model, but the percentage remains 0.

I found the SAP Note 2947933 with this issue and tried to implement the corrections. Unfortunately it was not relevant for our systems because we use the software component S4CORE 106.

Could you help with this issue?

Best regards.

entry.content: Dear Janarthanan, I hope you find yourself well! Thank you for joining the community. As soon as possible, a technical expert will contact you to clarify your question. I am adjusting the tags to redirect the issue to the right team. Best Regards, Erick Goulardt SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Billing block in VD05 is not copied to sales order.
entry.content:
Hello Akhilesh,

I could see you have opened a case with support and the engineer's reply was the bellow. Therefore, I'm adding it as an answer in the Community so others can benefit from this information as well. 🙂

"Referred to your description, it seems to be the same behavior as explained in the note 79618 - Billing block in customer master and sales order, there are two different types of billing block:

1. The billing block in the customer master is intended to generally block a customer for the billing transaction.
2. On the other hand, the billing block in the sales order is used to block only the current document for billing.

They are two kinds of field even they all call "Billing block", so this field should not be copied from customer master data into the sales order. If you would need to fulfill that requirement but do not want to set it on document type level, you may consider to apply custom logic in userexit, such as "USEREXIT_MOVE_FIELD_TO_VBAK".

For further details, you should contact your local development team or local consultants."

Kind regards,

Vic

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Create Your Rules (5/5)

Ankur

entry.title: Re: CDS view with Change Data Capture(CDC) for Replication Flow – Part 1
entry.content:
@danielmacho72 As far as I know, CDS-CDC can only be consumed by Datasphere and BW4/HANA.
To get the CDS-CDC data as event in AEM, what I could imagine is to send data from Datasphere to Kafka and then do a meshing with AEM but it is a bit complexe architecture.
See Apache Kafka Targets | SAP Help Portal
and Kafka Mesh | Solace

entry.title: VAR case forwarding via SAP Cloud ALM ITSM API
entry.content:
Hello,

We saw in the new PCOE agreement that for the case forwarding, we can use an alternative solution than SAP Solution Manager (SolMan).

I saw that there is an SAP Cloud ALM ITSM API now, but it seems that we have to connect our SAP Cloud ALM tenant to SAP. My question is: how is it done? I don't see an example of Case forwarding from another ITSM to the SAP Backbone.

Do you have any information that you can share with us? We'd like to anticipate the end of SolMan and move forward with a alternative way of case forwarding. And can we use it as we are a VAR partner for all our customer?

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: VAR case forwarding via SAP Cloud ALM ITSM API
entry.content:
The SAP Cloud ALM ITSM API is documented in:

  • API Guide for SAP Cloud ALM > ITSM API
  • SAP Business Accelerator Hub > SAP Cloud ALM REST ITSM API 

Any software that can execute REST API requests can use the ITSM API. E.G. a REST API client (Postman, Bruno, etc.) can be used to manually execute requests for testing purposes.

Your external ticketing software may be able to execute REST API requests. Refer to the external ticketing software documentation to check if it offers this functionality, and how to configure it.

On the SAP side, the configuration steps for "normal" (non-VAR) Customers and VAR Customers are the same. The values provided in the JSON Request Body are the only difference. Let's examine an example of the request POST /supportcases/cases.

The Request has several mandatory Body properties. These include:

  • customerNumber
  • installationNumber
  • customer
  • reporter

A "normal" (non-VAR) Customer uses only their own data in these properties. (E.G. both "customer" and "reporter" are an S-user ID from their own company authorized to create a Case, etc.)

A VAR Customer uses their End Customer's data in most of these properties. (E.G. "customer" is an S-user ID from the End Customer, "installationNumber" is the End Customer's installation number, etc.) The "reporter" property must be an S-user ID from the VAR itself. The resulting Case will be marked as a VAR Case in the Support Backbone.

entry.title: ML81N Error Movement 102 not occurred
entry.content:
The user created a entry sheet by ML81N transaction. It was accepted, where the movement 101 was created.

Subsequently, he needed to correct the release data, made the restart of the sheet by Ml81N and then deleted it. the problem is that the sheet was removed, but the movement 102 did not happen.

Has anyone seen this scenario?

entry.title: S-user Creation in SAP for Me
entry.content:
Hi,

How can I create new S-users and transfer permissions to the S-user?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: S-user Creation in SAP for Me
entry.content:
Hello,

Regarding the request of creating new S-users for the company, it is necessary for a current Super Administrator to create the S-User IDs on "User Management", as explained on KBA 1271482 - How does an administrator create or delete S-user IDs? - SAP for Me.

Once the new S-users are created, the definition of new Super Administrators can be done, by a Super Admin, who must assign their own authorizations to the new Super Admin, as per on KBA 1511008 - How to add or change S-user ID authorizations - SAP for Me. 
To make it easier, the steps on KBA 1614304 - How to use the Copy Authorization feature for S-user IDs - SAP for Me can be followed, providing all information to copy all authorizations at once and providing a package to promote the users to super admins.

Thank you,
SAP Support

entry.title: Simplify how users find and share data: new AI features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (2502)
entry.content:
The 2502 release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is here and I am excited to share with you how we are helping you achieve more, effortlessly, with new AI capabilities for business users.

These innovations are based on many interactions and feedback sessions we had with customers in 2024, including the SAP Fiori Innovation Day events in Dublin, Chicago, and Heidelberg; as well as the collaboration we had with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition customers during the cloud feature beta.  

Filter business data using natural language 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted easy filter enables you to set filters in SAP Fiori elements list report applications using natural language. Rather than setting each selection field manually to drill down for the business data you need, you can write a one-line query summarizing the required information – just like you would ask one of your colleagues. A large language model then interprets this query and translates it into filter values. This simplifies your information search and helps you get to the information you need faster, which can make you more productive and help you focus on the business decisions that matter. For example, imagine a busy sales manager filtering a list of top-performing accounts using a single sentence rather than walking through a variety of filters. 

This can also shorten the training time required to use different applications, as users simply search for what they need rather than needing to memorize specific selection field options.  

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted easy filter allows you to filter business data using natural language

Of course, as the user, you are free to choose how you would like to filter your list report page. Should you wish to switch between natural language filtering and the classic method, that option is available to you. Transparency is also important to us: When you use easy filter, the filter conditions (the values automatically selected for you) are displayed as filter tokens below your query. Based on your results, you can easily try a new query or manually change the filter tokens if you need to make small changes.  

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted easy filter can simplify and streamline how you find business data in your system. Just search for what you need and it will be served up to you. It’s as easy as that!  

Summarize object pages with the help of AI 

Object pages, containing the details of items from list report applications, can be complex. To help you find the information you need easily, you can use SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted smart summarization to generate customizable summaries of SAP Fiori elements-based object pages. Select the sections you want to see and let smart summarization show you what you want to know. This simplifies your search for information and allows you to focus on the details that matter for a given business decision without having to scroll around to find everything you need. 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted smart summarization allows you to generate summaries of SAP Fiori elements object pages

Once you have your summary generated, you can also make edits and share the summary with your colleagues. This simplifies how you share the information you need to move business processes forward.  

Personalize your SAP S/4HANA My Home page with Joule 

You can now use Joule to create cards for the Insights section of your My Home page that will give you personalized, business critical data at a glance. Rather than opening the required app, setting the required filters, and then creating the card natively in your SAP Fiori app; simply tell Joule what you need. It will create a card for you to preview and then you can add it to your My Home page with a single click to get access to essential information right when you log into the system, streamlining your decision making for the day. 

Insights card creation with Joule allows you to query for cards using natural language

Once your card is created, you can open the application directly from the card for further details, if required.  

Please note that this functionality is currently available for the following SAP Fiori applications for the 2502 release: Supplier Invoices List (Version 2), Manage Purchase Orders (Version 2), Manage Sales Orders, Manage Sales Orders - Version 2, Maintain Bill of Material, Find Maintenance Order, Find Maintenance Order and Operation, Manage Purchase Requisitions - Professional, and Project Control - Enterprise Projects. 

“How can I try this out?”  

We’re very excited to get these features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition out to you! Try them out, see how they can help you find, filter, and share information. Jump into one of your SAP-delivered list report applications to try out AI-assisted easy filter. 

Click the SAP Business AI button above the filter bar to use SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted easy filter

While you’re there, drill down into a business object and click the Summarization button at the top of the screen to create a quick summary of the data with AI-assisted smart summarization.  

Click the Summarize button at the top of your object page to use SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, AI-assisted smart summarization

Strike up a conversation with Joule on your My Home page and ask to create a card with data that’s relevant to you.  

Open Joule and ask for your desired business data to be displayed as a card. This can be added to your My Home page with a single click.

Once you’ve tried filtering using natural language, summarizing your object pages, or creating your own cards – we'd love to hear what you think! Feel free to share your feedback in the comments below.  

While we wait for your feedback, we’re also working on additional AI-assisted topics to simplify how you handle error messages in your system, as well as help you create cards for your Insights section directly in My Home. We look forward to sharing them with you. 

Please note that this reflects our current state of planning and SAP reserves the right to change its development priorities at any time.  

A note on data protection in AI solutions from SAP 

We are frequently asked about what happens to your business data once it runs through an AI solution from SAP. Business data and personal information processed by SAP’s AI solutions will not be used​ by third-party LLM providers for training purposes​. If you would like to learn more about our data protection practices with AI solutions, you can refer to SAP's statement on responsible AI:​ https://www.sap.com/products/artificial-intelligence/ai-ethics.html​

entry.title: How to Share Job postings with posting distributors
entry.content:
Hello,

many Customers do not have direct contracts with Job boards but with posting Distributors. This has the advantage that the postings are less pricy. How is it possible to Share the postings with the Distributor and also inform them for each Job to which Job boards the Customer wants the Distributor to Post the Jobs?

Recruiting Posting Feature cannot be used because it only includes the direct Job boards Like Stepstone but does Not provide the Option to include a Distributor.

Thanks so much

entry.title: Re: My First Experience with LeanIX: A Newcomer’s Guide to EA Modeling After getting Certification
entry.content:
Hi @HemantVaswani 

LeanIX has a best practice for SAP ECC here:
https://docs-eam.leanix.net/docs/modeling-sap-erp-60

Although the best practice shows the capabilities connected to the level 1 app, some may prefer to put the capabilities against the line of business modules e.g. PM, QM, etc. LeanIX does aggregate these up to the level 1 app automatically on reports.

entry.title: Re: Not able to login SAP
entry.content:
Hello,

Check if the database server is running.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Getting selected line items in ME22n
entry.content: Has anyone managed to resolve this? I need to know which lines are selected in the purchase order

entry.title: Released RAP BO/CDS views/class for reading and updating material class/characteristics
entry.content:
Hi,

We are searching for any released RAP BO/CDS views/class for reading and updating material class/characteristics. Basically anything that reads and updates the following standard tables in SAP: AUSP/CABN/KLAH/KSML.

Currently, we are using this BAPIs in our old ECC system.

BAPI_OBJCL_CHANGE
BAPI_OBJCL_CHANGE_KEY
BAPI_OBJCL_CREATE
BAPI_OBJCL_GET_KEY_OF_OBJECT
BAPI_OBJCL_GETCLASSES_KEY
BAPI_OBJCL_GETDETAIL_KEY

We are aware that there may be web APIs for this purpose (e.g., API_CLFN_CHARACTERISTIC, API_CLFN_CLASS) but we are wondering if there is any released objects from SAP to achieve clean core approach (i.e, Tier 1).

entry.title: Re: Ariba Contracts Integration with Fieldglass via Open...
entry.content:
Hello Akshay,

I think there is some confusion here. Ariba Parent/Child setup is for Ariba buying and invoicing (former P2P). Ariba contracts is separate module which comes with Ariba strategic sourcing suite. Ariba strategic sourcing suite supports multi-ERP setup.

Anyway, accessing contracts data via Ariba Open APIs has nothing to do with your existing CIG setup. you can access data using Open APIs irrespective of how Ariba sourcing and contracts is integrated to ERPs.

Hope this clarifies.

Regards,

Yayati

entry.title: Re: CLOUD INTEGRATION URL -don't have sufficient permissions to access Cloud Integration
entry.content: Log out and log back in from "Subaccount: trial - Instances and Subscriptions" will fix it if you completed all steps.

entry.title: Building Robust Enterprise Architecture: Unlocking Value Streams (In Business Context)
entry.content:
As I strengthen my expertise as a successful Enterprise Architect, I recognize that modeling Enterprise Architecture (EA) with a focus on value streams and processes is a highly effective approach for aligning business operations with customer value and strategic goals. This method enables me to identify opportunities for optimization, enhance operational efficiency, and improve organizational agility.

Understand the Core Concept of Value Streams and Processes

Before diving deep, let’s first define what we mean by value streams and processes:

Value Streams: A value stream is the series of activities an organization undertakes to deliver a product or service to customers, aiming to maximize value and minimize waste. It encompasses the flow of materials, information, and resources from concept to delivery.

Processes: Processes are a sequence of interrelated tasks performed consistently to achieve a specific outcome. Supported by systems, tools, and people, they contribute to the creation of value within a value stream.

Why Value Streams and Processes Matter in EA

Value streams and processes in EA align business goals with daily operations, improve visibility into workflows, and highlight inefficiencies. This approach promotes collaboration, reduces waste, and streamlines processes to cut costs. Real-time insights also enable faster decision-making and adaptability.

Here is a comprehensive, step-by-step approach to modeling EA through the lens of value streams and processes.

1. Define the Business Goals and Objectives

The foundation of any business architecture model is established through the clear articulation of the organization’s objectives and goals. Understand what the company aims to achieve—whether it is improving customer satisfaction, increasing operational efficiency, or driving innovation. These goals will serve as the foundation for identifying and aligning value streams and processes.

For example, a retail company may have the objective of improving customer satisfaction by making order fulfillment faster and more accurate, which in turn leads to increased loyalty and a stronger market position

2. Identify Core Value Streams

To effectively analyze and improve your organization's value stream, begin by identifying the starting and ending points to understand how value flows through the organization. Then, map the key activities that contribute to delivering the product or service. Finally, maintain a customer focus by ensuring the value stream aligns with customer needs, preferences, and desired outcomes.

Let’s add this to our retail company example: Customer Order Fulfillment is one of the core value streams for improving customer satisfaction, ensuring timely, accurate order processing and delivery while minimizing delays and errors to boost customer loyalty.

3. Identify and Map Key Processes Within Value Streams

After identifying value streams, map the processes within them, such as sales, production, and customer service. Analyze the flow to spot redundancies, inefficiencies, or bottlenecks. Signavio (Business Transformation Suite) can help by providing a platform to visualize, analyze, and optimize these processes, driving greater efficiency and transformation.

Let’s add this to our example: The key process steps inside the Customer Order Fulfillment value stream are as follows:

  • Order entry and verification (Order Received)
  • Inventory search and stock confirmation (Inventory Check)
  • Packaging and labeling (Shipping Preparation)
  • Payment authorization and fraud check (Payment Processing)
  • Shipment, tracking, and customer notification (Order Delivery)

4. Use Frameworks to Guide Implementation

To align your Enterprise Architecture with best practices and ensure scalability, leveraging frameworks like the SAP Reference Enterprise Architecture Framework is essential.

SAP Reference Architecture Framework

 

 The SAP Reference Architecture Framework is a structured framework designed to guide organizations in the deployment of SAP solutions while ensuring alignment with best practices and strategic business goals. It provides predefined templates and structures for implementing SAP systems to support various business processes.

Here, the mapped value stream is aligned with business objectives, business capabilities, SAP solutions, and KPIs within the SAP Reference Architecture framework.

 
Value Stream: Customer Order Fulfillment

 

5. Visualize the EA

Visualization of Enterprise Architecture (EA) in tools like SAP LeanIX helps represent complex systems and align business objectives, value streams, capabilities, SAP solutions, and KPIs. LeanIX uses factsheets to model these elements, providing a structured approach for better decision-making and communication across the organization.

By defining business objectives and linking them to value stream steps, each step connects to business capabilities via Capability Factsheets. These are mapped to SAP solutions through Application Factsheets, while KPIs are tracked using Metric Factsheets, ensuring alignment and clarity in achieving business goals.

 EAM in SAP LeanIX

 6. Keep Iterating

Business architecture is an ongoing process that requires continuous refinement to adapt to the ever-changing business environment. To ensure effectiveness, organizations should use Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to measure metrics such as customer satisfaction, efficiency, and cost.

Regularly revisiting the business architecture model allows for identification of improvement opportunities, and gathering feedback from stakeholders across the organization ensures informed adjustments that drive ongoing optimization and growth.

 To sum up, modeling business architecture with value streams and processes improves efficiency, aligns operations with goals, and enhances customer value. A structured, iterative approach drives success and growth while optimizing resources.

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇹 SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud (Linz, Austria)
entry.content: Hi! I'm looking forward to seeing you Andre! lg Föß

entry.title: Can I give my own order number to a hybris order or should it always be cart code.
entry.content:
Hi,

We have some OCC integration where another system can place order in hybris via v2 webservices.
They would like to provide their own order number.
Can anyone please let me know if it is possible to overwrite the order number generated by hybris or create the order with the number they provide instead of generating a new one.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone (standard) and visibility using {ui>/editable} and {= !${ui>/editable}}
entry.content:
Dear experts,

In our Fiori List report app, I would like to hide and show some of the Object Page fields and sections depending on whether the page is in Creation or Display mode. I have used Fiori Tools Page editor:

 

which resulted in JSON like so:

 

 

 

 "sections": {
        "A": {
            "form": {
                "fields": {
                    "ShortText": {
                        "visible": "{ui>/editable}"
                    },
                    "Desendtmstp": {
                        "visible": "{= !${ui>/editable}}"
                    },
                    "CreatedOn": {
                        "visible": "{= !${ui>/editable}}"
                    }
                }
            }
        },
        "D": {
            "visible": "{ui>/editable}"
        },

 

 

 

This works as intended in SAP BAS preview and from BTP subaccount HTML5 Apps. But from SAP Build Work Zone (standard edition) site and on the mobile devices everything is visible in both Create and Display mode.

What could be the problem and how can I fix it?

Thanks, BR Petra

entry.title: Re: Automatic E-Mail Alert when Exception in EWM MFS is fired
entry.content:
Hi, nice blog.

Is the advanced license needed to use this alert feature?

entry.title: Re: Combining Multiple Wildcard Searches in Same Report
entry.content: This is the error code I get when changing the condition to 'OR'. It will not allow me to change the outer 'AND'

entry.title: Re: Combining Multiple Wildcard Searches in Same Report
entry.content: "Query script generation failed. See your administrator. Binary node has 0 children"

entry.title: Re: Combining Multiple Wildcard Searches in Same Report
entry.content: Sorry for all the revisions.  Its actually the ANDs between each condition that don't belong.  Once you remove those, you should be able to double click and change that AND to an OR.  It sometimes is easier to remove all the conditions and add them again the way you need them. You only need the 3 conditions with an OR at the left.

I have validated all the settings related to product or workflow. But not sure why i am getting this error. Apricate Any inputs to reslove the issue

entry.title: SAP Integration Email Attachment Mail Adapter
entry.content:
Hi,
Hope you are doing great !

I am creating an SAP iFlow which has an exception sub process which runs a groovy script(Prepare Error Attachment) to log the exception and create an attachment with exception data. 
 



Once the attachment is created then at the last step I am using Mail adapter to send an email. 

Question: I want to send the attachment created using my groovy script along with my email. How can I pass the attachment from my Groovy Script iFlow Step to my Email Attachment Step ?  

Thanks,
Supreet

@sanjanasatyan, @Ryan-Crosby @gautham_krishna @Sriprasadsbhat

entry.title: Re: Operation level costing to header level costing rever...
entry.content:
Hello, 

If you reverse OLC then there wont be any impact on any scenario. Now, all the cost will be at header level. You can delesect with one order type and plant combination and check. 

Thanks,

Priyanka Mishra

entry.title: Re: S/4 OnPrem - Is Key User Extensibility "Clean Core" b...
entry.content:
Hi  @Marçal_Oliveras 

ABAP Cloud is the one common development model to build cloud-ready extensions and  applications, both on-stack and side-by-side scenarios. The ABAP Cloud development model builds on the following key concepts:

  • Usage of released APIs only
  • Cloud-optimized ABAP language
  • Cloud-optimized architecture

The development model covers both, key user and developer extensibility. The cloud-optimized ABAP language versions are „ABAP for Cloud Development” and “ABAP for Key Users”.

So yes, key user extensibility is part of ABAP Cloud and is clean core.

Regarding the organization of software components and packages:

  • For developer extensibility, you develop in a software component of language version ABAP for Cloud Development, for instance ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT. All objects in that software component must have the ABAP for Cloud Development language version. Objects in that software component can use any other object of that software component, and objects from other software components that are released for use in cloud development. The development objects are maintained using ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse.
  • For key user extensibility, you use a software component of language version Standard ABAP, typically HOME. The extensions are maintained via Fiori apps. Based on the user input, the apps will generate various development objects that make up the extension. As you already mentioned, the objects are created in a local package and then need to be moved to a package of that software component. The objects have either language version Standard ABAP or ABAP for Key Users. However, you do not need to worry: the apps will take care that everything is clean core, for instance, by restricting access: a key user extension can only access objects that are released for key user apps, or objects that were created by key user apps and were marked for use by the apps.
  • For classic extensibility, you develop in a software component of language version Standard ABAP, typically HOME. You create development objects in the Standard ABAP language version with the tool of your choice, for instance the SE80 transaction.

In a nutshell: for developer extensibility you need your own package(s) in a cloud development software component. You can use the HOME software component for key user and classic extensibility. However, I highly recommend using different packages for key user and classic extensibility.

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: EWM RF – Implement custom code in standard RF transaction
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

My knowledge of ABAP, and particularly the EWM RF Framework, is somewhat limited, so I thought I’d turn to the community for help 😊.

We are using the standard EWM RF functions (slightly enhanced with Screen Personas). During the picking process, we need to call a function module when the screen is loaded and after confirming a position.

In normal transactions, there’s usually the possibility to integrate custom logic via a BAdI in the PBO (before the screen is displayed) or PAI (after input is processed). I’m wondering how this can be done correctly in the RF Framework.

I can see the function modules for PBO and PAI in the code, but how can I implement custom logic here? Do I need to completely replace the function module, or is there a more elegant way to achieve this?

 

Below are some screenshots of my situation:

EWM RF Picking Screen – when this screen is presented it should trigger a function model and after confirming the task it should trigger again a function model.

SPRO - Customizing logical Transaction steps

Any tips are greatly appreciated.

Best Regards

Simon

entry.title: Re: Combining Multiple Wildcard Searches in Same Report
entry.content: I'm having a very hard time trying to get that outer 'AND' to disappear. When I try and drag it to the left, it grabs the whole lot of objects I'm trying to tie together. When I try and add the conditions one by one, it automatically creates an outer 'AND'. Question as to why separating them by a semicolon in the same box does not work? For example, 'Matches Pattern' + 'AB%;CD%;EF%' Thanks again!
